details.message: Debrief: TypeEvaluatorState extracted successfully. 17 vars + 28 methods moved to class. Thin wrappers preserve call sites. isNodeReachable via post-construction setter. Bulk sed needed manual fixup for interface members and property chains. Reflections: skeleton was accurate, bulk-sed-needs-fixup is generic tool quirk. No user corrections. Next: pyr-5hl needs SRE in fresh session.

SRE review complete. Key findings: (1) createSpecializedClassType's 5 non-interface helper deps all depend only on interface methods + imports — extractable. (2) isTypeFormSupported is trivial 3-line utility, used in 18 places. (3) 4 helpers shared with non-create* code — export from specialForms.ts, import back. (4) Functions NOT contiguous in 12915-17400 range. (5) Line numbers stale from pyr-kqo. Added: 2 success criteria (no circular imports, param tracing), 2 anti-patterns (no import from typeEvaluator.ts, incremental extraction), Key Considerations section with dependency analysis, extraction order, adversarial failure modes. Recommendation: APPROVE with updates applied.

Phase 1 complete: 15 functions extracted and wired from dispatch table, 777 lines removed from typeEvaluator.ts (28422→27645). Functions: createFinalType, createClassVarType, createCallableType, createOptionalType, createTypeFormType, createTypeGuardType, createSelfType, createRequiredOrReadOnlyType, createUnpackType, createConcatenateType, createAnnotatedType, createUnionType, createGenericType, plus helpers (isTypeFormSupported, validateTypeVarTupleIsUnpacked, getBooleanValue, getFunctionFullName, applyUnpackToTupleLike, createSpecialType). 12 stub functions remain. All 2344 tests pass.

Correction: createTypeAliasType IS extractable. getTypeOfTypeAliasCommon uses readTypeCache/writeTypeCache/setSymbolResolutionPartialType — all on TypeEvaluatorState (extracted in pyr-kqo). synthesizeTypeAliasPlaceholder and transformTypeForTypeAlias are domain functions whose deps resolve to interface + state + imports. No functions are 'too entangled' — the whole point of pyr-kqo was making state accessible as a parameter. Interface expansion complete: only getTypesType + getTypeOfModule were needed.

Phase 2 progress: 5 of 12 stubs extracted. Functions extracted this session: createAwaitableReturnType, createAsyncFunction, createTypeVarType+verifyTypeVarDefaultIsCompatible, createTypeVarTupleType+getTypeVarTupleDefaultType, createParamSpecType+getParamSpecDefaultType. Also removed dead getBooleanValue closure def. typeEvaluator.ts: 28422→27082 (-1340 lines). specialForms.ts: 1412→1968 (+556 lines). Net reduction: 784 lines from closure. All 2344 tests pass. Remaining 7 stubs are increasingly complex — createTypeAliasType needs getTypeOfTypeAliasCommon (expression eval), createNewType/createClassFromMetaclass need getTypeOfArgExpectingType, createSpecializedClassType is ~550 lines with many deps.

Phase 3: 5 more stubs extracted this session (createNewType, createClassFromMetaclass, createTypeAliasType, createSpecialBuiltInClass, createSubclass). Total: 10 of 12. typeEvaluator.ts down to 26,621 lines (from 27,082). Added getTypeOfTypeAliasCommon + TypeParameterNode to TypeEvaluator interface. Two 'very hard' stubs remain: createSpecializedClassType (~550 lines) and createSpecializedTypeAlias (~280 lines).

All 12 stubs extracted. createSpecializedClassType (~555 lines) and createSpecializedTypeAlias (~280 lines) extracted to specialForms.ts with co-extracted helpers (transformTypeArgsForParamSpec, applyTypeArgToTypeVar). Added inferVarianceForTypeAlias, getTypeArgs, adjustTypeArgsForTypeVarTuple to TypeEvaluator interface. Removed closure createSpecialType (only callers moved). typeEvaluator.ts: 25,443 lines (down 2,979 from 28,422 at start). specialForms.ts: 3,443 lines. All 2,344 tests pass.
